content.full_text:
April 10, 2006

Wylie A. Aitken
Aitken Aitken & Cohn
P.O. Box 2555
Santa Ana, CA 92707-0555

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-194

Dear Mr. Aitken:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission has withdrawn your September 16, 2005, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act,1 as you requested during out phone conversation. Consequently, no response will be prepared. Your request is withdrawn.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: William J. Lenkeit
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

WJL:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\05-194

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
